description: Create a targeted promotional landing page for 'Pro Series' equipment at http://localhost using Drupal Views. Build a View named 'Pro Audio Sale' for 'Commerce Products' with a page display at the path '/pro-audio'. The page must filter for published products containing 'Pro' in the title and include a header with the text 'Upgrade your setup with our professional gear.' Additionally, add a 'Pro Audio' link to the Main Navigation menu for this page. Use the credentials admin / Admin1234!.

metadata.expected_header_text: Upgrade your setup with our professional gear
